use_cases.description: Support team creates, views, edits, deletes, and resets student records.
main_flow: System stores StudentRecord and user profile
Support team can reset password or mark graduation status

use_cases.description: Support team promotes students from one class/section to another academic class/section.
Support team creates timetables, timetable records, and time slots for classes.
Support team manages student payments, invoices, and receipts.
main_flow: Support team can download PDF receipts

use_cases.description: Support team enters and updates student marks for exams, classes, sections, and subjects.
Student or authorized user views marksheet for a selected year/exam and can print it.
main_flow: System loads marks and exam records

use_cases.description: Support team generates and prints class/section tabulation sheets for exams.
Support team manages classes, sections, subjects, grades, and exams.
Parent views linked children and their school records.
main_flow: System retrieves children linked to parent
Parent views child list and available actions

use_cases.description: Authenticated user updates profile information or changes password.
Support team generates PINs and users enter/verify PINs for controlled access to resources such as marks.
Admin lists and creates student records.
Admin lists, views, creates, and saves course records.
main_flow: Admin opens course detail or add form

use_cases.description: Admin enrolls a student in a course.
Admin removes a course association from a student.
Admin adds or saves passport details for a student.
main_flow: Admin opens passport add page for student
System saves Passport linked to Student

use_cases.description: Admin or user adds a review for a course.
main_flow: System saves Review linked to Course

use_cases.description: Admin removes a review from a course.
Admin views all student records on the list page.

use_cases.use_case_name: Open student create or edit form
use_cases.description: Admin opens the save page either to create a new student or edit an existing student.
main_flow: System loads student by id when q is provided

use_cases.description: Admin creates a new student or updates an existing student.
main_flow: System checks whether id is empty

use_cases.description: Admin deletes a student record.
Admin lists student records as JSON for a paginated table.
Admin checks whether a student name is valid and available before saving.
main_flow: System checks name format and uniqueness

use_cases.description: Admin creates a new student record.
main_flow: API returns success or validation errors

use_cases.description: Admin loads a student by id and updates that record.
Admin deletes one or multiple student records.
main_flow: Admin selects one or more students
System deletes single or batch ids

use_cases.description: Admin loads department records for student forms and filters.
Librarian creates, updates, deletes, lists, and retrieves books through REST API.
Librarian registers a new library user.
Librarian retrieves the list of all users.
User borrows a book from the library.
User returns a borrowed book.
User retrieves a single book by id.
User registers an account for accessing the learning management system.
main_flow: System creates user account and profile

use_cases.description: Authenticated user views and updates profile details and changes password.
Admin views dashboard metrics for school demographics and learning activity.
Admin creates, edits, and deletes news or event items visible to users.
Admin manages academic session records for grouping courses and results by year.
main_flow: System uses session in academic records

use_cases.description: Admin manages semester records used to group assessments and grades.
main_flow: System uses semester for assessment grouping

use_cases.description: Admin creates, lists, edits, deletes, and exports student records.
main_flow: Admin deletes or exports student list

use_cases.description: Admin creates, lists, edits, deletes, and exports lecturer records.
main_flow: Admin deletes or exports lecturer list

use_cases.description: Admin creates parent accounts linked to student records.
Admin creates, views, edits, and deletes academic programs.
Admin creates, views, edits, and deletes courses under programs.
Admin assigns courses to lecturers and can edit or deallocate assigned courses.
Lecturer uploads, edits, and deletes documentation files for a course.
Lecturer uploads, views, edits, and deletes video tutorials for a course.
main_flow: Lecturer views, edits, or deletes video

use_cases.description: Student adds and drops courses during course registration.
Lecturer enters attendance, assignment, mid exam, and final exam scores for students in a course.
main_flow: System calculates totals, grade points, and comments

use_cases.description: Student views grade results and assessment breakdown for registered courses.
main_flow: System filters TakenCourse and Result by current user
Student views grades and assessment results

use_cases.use_case_name: Download registration form and result sheet
use_cases.description: Student or authorized user generates PDF registration forms and result sheets.
main_flow: System loads registered courses or course result sheet
User downloads or views generated document

use_cases.description: Lecturer creates, updates, and deletes quizzes for a course.
Lecturer adds multiple-choice questions to a quiz.

use_cases.use_case_name: Take quiz and continue incomplete quiz
use_cases.description: Student takes a quiz, answers randomized questions, and can resume an incomplete attempt when allowed.
main_flow: System prepares sitting and question order

use_cases.description: Lecturer lists completed quiz sittings and opens a marking detail page for review.
Student views previous quiz scores and category success progress.
main_flow: System loads Progress and Sitting records

use_cases.description: User searches across news, programs, courses, and quizzes.
main_flow: System searches news/events, programs, courses, quizzes

use_cases.description: Student selects a payment gateway and completes payment for platform-related charges.
main_flow: Student chooses Stripe, PayPal, Coinbase, Paylike, or GoPay

use_cases.description: Admin creates invoices and views invoice details.
Master user manages school records and school-level settings.
Admin registers students, teachers, accountants, and librarians for a school.
main_flow: User can later log in with assigned role

use_cases.description: Admin creates classes, sections, and departments used to organize students and courses.
main_flow: Other modules use section and class ids

use_cases.description: Teacher records attendance for students in a section/course/exam context.
Teacher modifies a student's previously recorded attendance entry.
Teacher calculates marks and saves grades for students in an exam/course/section.
Student views grade records and marks for their exams.
Accountant creates and views school fee records.
Accountant maintains accounting sectors, income records, and expense records.
main_flow: System lists and filters accounting records

use_cases.description: Admin creates and activates exams used for grading and attendance contexts.
Admin manages syllabus, notice, event, and routine resources for school academic communication.
main_flow: System stores uploaded or configured content

use_cases.description: Librarian creates, views, updates, and deletes library book records.
Librarian issues books to users and marks issued books as returned.
main_flow: Librarian marks a book as returned

use_cases.description: Admin imports students/teachers from Excel and exports user lists.
User signs up, logs in, and logs out of the LMS.
main_flow: User logs in or logs out through auth views

use_cases.description: Teacher creates a course to host assignments and resources.
main_flow: System saves Course with teacher as creator

use_cases.description: User browses all available courses and opens course details.
main_flow: System includes assignments and resources for the course

use_cases.description: Student enrolls in a course.
main_flow: System creates Enrollment linking student and course

use_cases.description: Student leaves a course by removing enrollment.
main_flow: Course no longer appears as enrolled

use_cases.description: Teacher creates an assignment for a course.
Teacher edits an existing assignment.
main_flow: Teacher changes title, content, or course

use_cases.description: Teacher deletes an assignment that is no longer needed.
Student submits a response file or answer for an assignment.
Student deletes a submitted assignment response when allowed.
Teacher grades a submitted assignment.
Teacher uploads a resource for a course.
main_flow: Teacher selects course and resource file/details

use_cases.description: Teacher removes a course resource.
Librarian adds a new book to the library catalog through REST API.
User lists all books in the library catalog.
User searches books by a query string.
User retrieves details for a specific book.
Librarian or system registers a library user.
Librarian lists registered library users.
User borrows an available book for a selected number of days.
User returns a borrowed book and the loan record is updated.
Admin creates, views, updates, and deletes staff/teacher accounts.
main_flow: Admin adds or edits staff profile
System creates CustomUser with Staff profile

use_cases.description: Admin creates, views, updates, and deletes student accounts and assigns course/session.
main_flow: System creates CustomUser with Student profile
Admin updates or deletes student record

use_cases.description: Admin adds, views, edits, and deletes courses used to group students, staff, and subjects.
main_flow: Admin edits/deletes course if constraints allow

use_cases.description: Admin creates and maintains subjects linked to courses and assigned staff.
main_flow: Admin can view, edit, or delete subject

use_cases.description: Admin creates, views, edits, and deletes academic sessions used for student attendance and enrollment context.
main_flow: Admin can edit or delete session when allowed

use_cases.description: Teacher records attendance for students in a selected subject and academic session.
Teacher updates previously recorded attendance records for a subject/session/date.
Teacher records test and exam scores for students in assigned subjects.
main_flow: Teacher enters test and exam scores

use_cases.description: Teacher submits a leave application for admin review and can view leave history.
main_flow: System stores LeaveReportStaff with pending status

use_cases.description: Student views attendance records by subject and date range.
main_flow: Student sees attendance status by date

use_cases.description: Student views stored test and exam results for enrolled subjects.
main_flow: System loads StudentResult records for current student

use_cases.description: Admin reviews student and staff leave applications and approves or rejects them.
Admin reviews feedback submitted by students or staff and saves replies.

use_cases.use_case_name: Sign in to library admin panel
use_cases.description: Admin opens the login page and signs in to access the library management application.
main_flow: System grants access to protected library screens

use_cases.description: Admin views paginated book inventory from the main library screen.
Admin searches for books by keyword.
main_flow: System renders matching books and keyword

use_cases.description: Admin creates a new book while selecting author, category, and publisher data.
main_flow: System creates book and redirects to list

use_cases.description: Admin edits an existing book record.
main_flow: Admin opens update form for book
System updates book and redirects to list

use_cases.description: Admin removes a book from the library catalog.
Admin lists, views, creates, updates, and deletes authors.
main_flow: System creates, updates, or deletes author

use_cases.description: Admin lists, views, creates, updates, and deletes book categories.
Admin lists, views, creates, updates, and deletes publishers.
Admin exports a selected library dataset as a CSV file.
main_flow: Admin requests export by file name

use_cases.description: Admin lists all books and opens a specific book detail.
Admin searches books by keyword.
Admin creates a new book with author, category, and publisher choices.
Admin edits an existing book record.
Admin removes a book record.
Admin lists, views, creates, updates, and deletes authors.
Admin lists, views, creates, updates, and deletes book categories.
Admin lists, views, creates, updates, and deletes publishers.
User signs in and retrieves own profile through role-aware API authentication.
Admin creates, lists, edits, deletes, or bulk imports teacher records and their linked user accounts.
main_flow: System creates Teacher and linked User/group

use_cases.description: Admin manages accountant users who can access finance functions.
main_flow: Admin creates or updates accountant record
System persists accountant and associated access
Admin can retrieve or delete accountant

use_cases.description: Admin manages parent or guardian records linked to students.
main_flow: Admin retrieves or deletes parent record

use_cases.description: Admin or SIS staff creates, lists, edits, and deletes student records with class and parent/guardian data.
main_flow: System stores admission, class, guardian, and debt fields

use_cases.description: Admin imports many students from an Excel file and creates related parent/sibling links where applicable.
Admin manages departments, class levels, grade levels, academic years, streams, and subjects.
main_flow: Admin creates or updates academic reference data

use_cases.description: Admin imports subjects, classrooms, or student-class assignments in bulk.
Accountant records payments and allocates payments to receipts or debts for a student.

use_cases.use_case_name: Manage receipts and student debt overview
use_cases.description: Accountant creates receipts, bulk imports receipt data, and views receipts or debt overview for a student.
main_flow: Accountant views per-student receipts and debt overview

use_cases.description: Accountant recalculates current, past, or missing student debts and can reverse a debt operation.
Teacher records teacher, student, or period attendance through attendance API endpoints.
Admin manages periods and triggers automatic timetable generation.
Admin manages academic years, terms, and school events, including bulk event upload and template download.
main_flow: Admin imports events or downloads template

use_cases.description: Instructor creates a video resource in a playlist/course context for later upload and playback.
main_flow: Instructor opens LTI select or admin interface
System stores Video linked to playlist
Video becomes available for upload/playback workflow

use_cases.description: Instructor initiates direct upload for a video file and receives upload parameters for storage backend.
Instructor signals that video upload has ended so the system can update upload state and trigger processing.
Learner accesses a published course resource and watches the embedded video player through LTI or direct public view.
Instructor uploads timed text tracks such as subtitles, closed captions, or transcripts for a video.
main_flow: System stores track metadata and upload state

use_cases.description: Instructor uploads or updates a thumbnail image for a video resource.
main_flow: System stores thumbnail and notifies admin clients

use_cases.description: Instructor creates and manages document resources distributed through a course.
main_flow: Learners can later view document reader

use_cases.description: Instructor uploads a document file using the direct upload workflow.
Instructor or organization manages playlists that group media resources and LTI access.
main_flow: System stores playlist metadata and access links
LTI selection can use playlist context

use_cases.description: Organization admin grants or manages access to playlists for users or organizations.
main_flow: Authorized users can access playlist resources

use_cases.description: Instructor starts a live session for a video resource.
Instructor stops a live session and triggers harvesting or conversion to video-on-demand when appropriate.
main_flow: System can convert live to VOD

use_cases.description: Learner playback events are sent as xAPI statements for analytics.
Instructor creates or manages a classroom/meeting resource for synchronous learning.
main_flow: Classroom can be joined and managed

use_cases.description: Instructor uploads documents associated with a classroom resource.
Admin adds a new book and optionally creates inventory copies with generated barcode references.
main_flow: System creates Inventory items and frontend generates barcode PDF

use_cases.description: Admin searches book records and updates book metadata.
Admin deletes an entire book or selected inventory references, respecting availability constraints.
main_flow: If no specific reference is supplied, system deletes book record

use_cases.description: Admin adds, searches, updates, and deletes library user accounts.
User orders a book when at least one inventory reference is available.
User views active book orders associated with their account.
User views returned/closed order history for their account.
User filters own orders by return overdue or collection overdue status.
main_flow: System fetches overdue orders for authenticated user

use_cases.description: Admin searches active orders by order id, user id, or book id.
Admin marks a pending order as collected after user picks up the book.

use_cases.use_case_name: Mark order as returned and generate invoice
use_cases.description: Admin marks a borrowed book as returned, updates inventory availability, and produces order history/invoice data including late fees if applicable.
main_flow: System creates history with returnedAt/late fee data

use_cases.description: Users log in and are routed to Admin or User views based on authenticated role.
main_flow: Router enforces ADMIN or USER route authorization

use_cases.description: Visitor lists courses in a product group and sees price converted for a requested bank or currency provider.
main_flow: System returns course data with bank-specific price context

use_cases.description: Visitor checks the price of a course after applying a promocode and optional bank selection.
main_flow: Visitor submits course slug and promocode
System returns calculated price for selected bank

use_cases.description: Visitor creates an order draft to preview course and payment price before purchase.
main_flow: Visitor submits course slug, promocode, and desired bank
System returns course summary and price

use_cases.description: Visitor purchases a course, creating or reusing a user, creating an order, and redirecting to a payment link.
main_flow: System returns redirect to bank payment URL

use_cases.description: Learner follows an order confirmation URL so the system marks the order paid and redirects to success page.
main_flow: System redirects to course success URL

use_cases.description: Authenticated learner lists courses already purchased or available for study.
main_flow: System filters courses for current user

use_cases.description: Authenticated learner browses course modules exposed by the LMS API.
Authenticated learner retrieves lesson content through the LMS API.
Authenticated learner retrieves a Notion-backed material page after permission and cache checks.
main_flow: System loads cached or remote Notion page

use_cases.description: Admin checks material cache status and forces a Notion material update.
Learner submits or updates homework answers and uploads supporting images or attachments.
Learner creates or removes a reaction on a homework answer where permissions allow it.
Learner lists peer review or cross-check tasks assigned for homework assessment.
Learner or authorized user retrieves diploma records through a permission-controlled API.
main_flow: User can retrieve appropriate diploma data

use_cases.description: Admin lists platform users through an admin-only API endpoint.
User obtains an authentication token, requests password reset, changes password, or uses a passwordless token.
main_flow: System sends or accepts passwordless/reset token
System returns authenticated access or password update result

use_cases.description: Payment providers send webhooks so the backend validates and applies Tinkoff, Dolyame, or Stripe payment status updates.
main_flow: System updates order/payment state and returns provider response
